name: gradient-heading
title: Gradient Heading
author: Parable
description: A polymorphic heading (h1–h6/p) whose text is painted with a background-clipped brand gradient in three variants and four sizes. When motion is allowed the gradient drifts on a slow ~8s ease-in-out loop; under prefers-reduced-motion or animate={false} it renders a legible static gradient with edge-defining shadow.
